goal: Release-grade perfection for Backend-definitivo-V5 — measurable, ratcheting, no masked failures.

release_gate.decision: Phase 8+9 sufficient for production — merge to main; ratchet holds floor at 94.14/88.69.

phases.name: surface_coverage
deliverables: HTTP matrix over all documented paths
coverage ratchet CI
strict 422 on critical empty payloads
engine unit tests for weakest modules

phases.name: contract_hardening
deliverables: Per-endpoint-family response contracts in tests
Expand STRICT_INVALID_JSON_4xx to all semantically-required-body routes
STRICT_SUCCESS set for endpoints with curated overrides
Reject partial/error on valid matrix payloads where engine has data

phases.name: golden_scientific
deliverables: Golden JSON fixtures from athlete PDFs / lab protocols
Regression tests: same inputs → same outputs (versioned)
FIT assets: minimal, full, corrupt, timezone edge cases

phases.name: coverage_depth
phases.notes: Line within 0.15pp of target; branch gap (~1pp) folded into Phase 5 stretch. Misplaced engine test file removed; depth suite batches 11–15 added.
deliverables: Branch coverage on all api/services and engines/* public APIs
chart_builder full coverage
race_prediction, hrv, phenotype engines covered
Property/fuzz tests on parsers (FIT, GPX, lab text)

phases.name: perfection_gate
phases.notes: Phase 5 coverage gate closed at 92.0/85.33. Batches H–M, API/workout ports, mmp_aggregator date fix. FIT recovery branches deferred until real assets uploaded.
deliverables: make perfection-gate (or check) is the single release blocker
Documented exceptions list (must be empty or explicitly approved)
Frontend contract + backend golden alignment

phases.name: coverage_medium
phases.notes: Medium coverage pass: pytest_phase6_coverage_medium.py (28 tests). 11/20 medium-tier modules ≥90% branch; global +1.35pp line, +2.09pp branch vs Phase 5.
deliverables: Branch-focused tests for compliance, zones, twin_state, auth, adaptive_load, workout engines
Coverage baseline ratchet to 93.35/87.42

phases.name: coverage_heavy
phases.notes: Heavy pass: pytest_phase7_coverage_heavy.py (15 tests). Golden FIT assets exercised; hrv_engine 90.5%, cardiac_engine 93.1%, fit_parser 90.4%, workout_summary 90.2%.
deliverables: Parse all golden FIT files (CRC recovery, truncated, RR/HRV)
HRV/cardiac segment depth tests
workout_summary E2E on real FIT streams
Coverage baseline ratchet to 93.53/87.77

phases.name: coverage_100_push
phases.notes: Phase 8 push toward 100%: pytest_phase8_coverage_100.py (32 tests). +0.29pp line, +0.52pp branch vs Phase 7. interval_detector 92%, fit_parser 94.5%, effort_extractor 92.5%. Remaining gap ~499 branches — literal 100% deferred (pragma/no-cover, dev paths).
deliverables: Branch-focused tests for interval_detector, hrv_engine, fit_parser, cardiac, thermal, session_router, lab_data, effort_extractor
Coverage baseline ratchet to 93.82/88.29

phases.name: coverage_95_gate_push
phases.notes: Phase 9: pytest_phase9_coverage_95.py (23 tests). API services cluster ~94.6% branch (ride_analytics 97.9%, twin 95.6%). Global branch +0.40pp vs Phase 8; literal 95% global still ~269 branches away.
deliverables: HRV/cardiac/thermal engine depth + API service error-path tests
High-yield batch2: neuromuscular, race_prediction, mmp_quality, pedaling_balance, activity_charts
Coverage baseline ratchet to 94.14/88.69

phases.name: coverage_stretch_optional
phases.notes: Optional post-release stretch toward ~92% global branch. Not a release blocker; pursue only if numeric gate is required.

non_goals: Literal 95–100% global branch coverage as a release prerequisite
100% line coverage on dev-only scripts (audit.py, __main__ blocks)
ratchet_policy: tests/coverage_baseline.json and this manifest advance only when a phase target is met and make check is green.
